prompt: An original dark-fantasy vanguard unit called Anchor Shard: a massive brawler wielding a huge anchor-chain weapon, iron-and-rust armor plating, thick chain wrapped tightly around both forearms and knuckles, heavy hulking build, cel-shaded 2.5D anime/game production art, painterly textures, high readability, full-body, three-quarter hero framing, clear weapon silhouette, wide grounded heavy stance, solid cold steel-grey rim lighting with rust-orange accent highlights, isolated on a perfectly uniform solid #FF00FF magenta background, no shadow outside the base, no text, no logos, no watermark, no copyrighted character likeness, original design only.
